moments.title: Wimbledon continues
moments.blurb: The third Grand Slam of the tennis season, Wimbledon, continues at the All England Lawn Tennis and Croquet Club, with top players competing on the grass courts.

angles.name: General buzz
angles.copy: Centre Court drama, rain delays, and unexpected upsets. Wimbledon is in full swing and we're glued to every serve and volley!

angles.name: UK talent focus
angles.copy: Who are you backing for the title at Wimbledon this year? The British hopefuls are making us proud!
